samples.xml_description:
Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers. Clock signal. Reset signal. Sign bit (1 for signed). 16-bit input operand (dividend). 16-bit input operand (divisor). Valid operation signal. Ready for result signal. Result valid signal. 16-bit output result. 0 1 2 3 4 Initialize the state and counter. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `IDLE: begin
          state <= `SUB;
          counter <= 0;
       end
endcase
end
end Subtract the divisor from the shifted dividend. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `SUB: begin
          sub_result <= SR - NEG_DIVISOR;
       end
endcase
end
end Determine the carry-out. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `SUB: begin
          if (sub_result[16] == 1) begin
            SR <= SR - NEG_DIVISOR;
            carry_out <= 0;
       end
          else begin
            SR <= sub_result;
            carry_out <= 1;
       end
       end
endcase
end
end Select the next value of the shift register. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `SUB: begin
          if (carry_out == 1) begin
            SR <= {SR[15:0], carry_out};
       end
       end
endcase
end
end Shift the register. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `SUB: begin
          if (carry_out == 1) begin
            SR <= {SR[15:0], carry_out};
       end
       end
endcase
end
end Check if the division is done. always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
       state <= `IDLE;
       counter <= 0;
    end
    else begin
       case (state)
       `SUB: begin
          if (carry_out == 1) begin
            SR <= {SR[15:0], carry_out};
       end
